title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: helm-chart-ollama
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rust-based TUI chat client for Ollama with syntax highlighting and conversation save.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside a buffer or generate/refactor code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Another community Helm chart focused on single-node GPU deployments with simple values.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to spin up Ollama service and run model-based tests in pipelines.

title: ollama-text-generation-webui
summary: Official example showing how to wire Ollama into the popular text-generation-webui project.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with serde types, streaming, and embed support.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration to inject Ollama Java client as a bean with YAML config.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, Gemma and more.

title: ollama-reddit-discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.11 with Llava multimodal support and performance tweaks.
